revision.comment: Skip {{lorem ipsum}} on transclusions to save resources per details on [[Wikipedia:Template limits]]. Don't let {{lorem ipsum}} show up in lists of transcluded templates on ordinary pages
Default font Times New Roman per talk page request
reduced " size as per request on talk page
Implement changes proposed on talk page
rm merge tag per talk page request
changed align to margin; made protection tag less obnoxious; standardized documentation
% instead of em, em gives problems in IE
rm line-height:100%;, gives problems with IE, not enough in the case of ref tags
Nominated for deletion; see [[Wikipedia:Templates for deletion#Template:Cquote]]. ([[WP:TW|TW]])

revision.comment: Tariqabjotu moved page [[Template:Cquote]] to [[Template:Centered pull quote]]: per move request on talk page
add includeonly tags per protected edit request
Add line-height for quotes, replace some deprecated markup
less lineheight for quotes, other fixes.
not an actual semantic table, so mark with role=presentation (variants of <blockquote> templates are even better.)
code cleanup (see recent sandbox history for what each tweak is)
support parameter names of [[Template:Pull quote2]] for easier conversion; added title param. to cat. test
thin no-break space after em dash for readability

moving virtually dead code to ends of the #if tests (no one uses the numbered parameters any more since {{{3}}} was eliminated a long time ago); adding {{{quotetext}}} param. alias, from [[Template:Pull quote2]], for easier conversion.
installing RTL test so RTL variant of this template need not exist separately
throw an error if they forget to include the quote text
Use thinspace; nbsp is too wide (or use nbsp and en dash, but full-width spaces are not used with em dashes).
merging redundant code (and keeping it all inside "<!-- {{subst:FULLPAGENAME}} -->"); enabling citation of source w.o. author (e.g. scripture, law, etc.); sandboxed and testcased already.
per te request at [[Template talk:Pull quote#Pull quote templates edit request on 6 April 2016]]
adding parameter aliases to make pull quote templates more consistent
add optional rtl for right-to-left quotes in Arabic, will use in [[Ada Jafri]]
add optional rtl for right-to-left quotes in Arabic, will use in [[Ada Jafri]]
use hair space not thin space, like the rest of these templates
add explicit article-space example, per [[Template_talk:Rquote#Template-protected_edit_request_on_18_November_2020|this complaint]]
revision.text:
<noinclude>The template appears as follows in article space:
{{Quote|text={{lorem ipsum}}}}
and as follows in all other namespaces:
</noinclude>{{main other 
|demospace={{{demospace|}}} 
|1=<!-- result if in mainspace -->{{quote 
| text={{{text|{{{content|{{{quotetext|{{{quote|{{{1|<includeonly>{{error|Error: No text given for quotation (or equals sign used in the actual argument to an unnamed parameter)}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{lorem ipsum}}</noinclude>}}} }}} }}} }}} }}}
| author={{{author|{{{personquoted|}}} }}} 
| title ={{{title|{{{quotesource|{{{4|}}} }}} }}}
| source={{{source|{{{publication|{{{5|{{#if:{{{title}}}|{{{quotesource|}}}| }} }}} }}} }}}
}} 
|2=<!-- result if elsewhere --> 
{{(!}} class="cquote pullquote" role="presentation" {{#if:{{{rtl|}}}|dir="rtl"}} style="{{#switch:{{{float|}}}
  | left = float:left
  | right = float:right
  | #default = margin:auto
  }}; border-collapse: collapse; border: none; background-color: {{{bgcolor|transparent}}}; width: {{#if: {{{wide|}}} | 100% | {{{width|auto}}}}}; {{#if: {{{bgcolor|}}} | border: 1px solid #AAAAAA;}}"
{{!}} style="width: 20px; vertical-align: top; border: none; color: {{{qcolor|#B2B7F2}}}; font-size: {{#switch:{{{size|{{{quotewidth|{{{width|{{{2|20px}}}}}}}}}}}}
|10px=20px
|30px=60px
|40px=80px
|50px=100px
|60px=120px
|#default=40px}}; font-family: {{#if:{{{rtl|}}}|Roman|'Times New Roman', Times}}, serif; font-weight: bold; line-height: .6em; text-align: left; padding: {{#if:{{{small|}}}|10px 2px|10px 10px}};" {{!}} {{#if:{{{rtl|}}}|”|“}}
{{!}} style="vertical-align: top; border: none;{{#if:{{{rtl|}}}|direction:rtl;}} padding: {{#if:{{{small|}}}|4px 2px|4px 10px}}; {{#ifeq:{{{quotealign|}}}|center|text-align:center;}}" {{!}} {{trim quotes|{{{text|{{{content|{{{quotetext|{{{quote|{{{1|<includeonly>{{error|Error: No text given for quotation (or equals sign used in the actual argument to an unnamed parameter)}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{lorem ipsum}}</noinclude>}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}
{{!}} style="width: 20px; vertical-align: bottom; border: none; color: {{{qcolor|#B2B7F2}}}; font-size: {{#switch:{{{size|{{{quotewidth|{{{width|{{{2|20px}}}}}}}}}}}}
|10px=20px
|30px=60px
|40px=80px
|50px=100px
|60px=120px

revision.comment: Skip {{lorem ipsum}} on transclusions to save resources per details on [[Wikipedia:Template limits]]. Don't let {{lorem ipsum}} show up in lists of transcluded templates on ordinary pages
Default font Times New Roman per talk page request
reduced " size as per request on talk page
Implement changes proposed on talk page
rm merge tag per talk page request
changed align to margin; made protection tag less obnoxious; standardized documentation
% instead of em, em gives problems in IE
rm line-height:100%;, gives problems with IE, not enough in the case of ref tags
Nominated for deletion; see [[Wikipedia:Templates for deletion#Template:Cquote]]. ([[WP:TW|TW]])

{| class="cquote" style="margin:auto; border-collapse: collapse; border: none; background-color: {{{bgcolor|transparent}}}; width: {{#if: {{{wide|}}} | 100% | auto}}; {{#if: {{{bgcolor|}}} | border: 1px solid #AAAAAA;}}" | width="20" valign="top" style="border:none; color:#B2B7F2;font-size:{{#switch:{{{size|{{{2|{{{quotewidth|{{{width|20px}}}}}}}}}}}} |10px=20px |30px=60px |40px=80px |50px=100px |60px=120px |#default=35px}};font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif; font-weight: bold; text-align: left; padding: 10px 10px;" | “ | valign="top" style="border: none; padding: 4px 10px;" | {{{text|{{{1|Insert the text of the quote here, without quotation marks. {{lorem ipsum}}}}}}}} | width="20" valign="bottom" style="border: none; color: #B2B7F2; font-size: {{#switch:{{{size|{{{2|{{{quotewidth|{{{width|20px}}}}}}}}}}}} |10px=20px |30px=60px |40px=80px |50px=100px |60px=120px |#default=35px}}; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif; font-weight: bold; text-align: right; padding: 10px 10px;" | ” |- {{#if:{{{4|{{{author|}}}}}}{{{5|{{{source|{{{publication|}}}}}}}}}| {{!}} colspan="3" class="cquotecite" style="border: none; padding-right: 4%" {{!}} {{#if:{{{4|{{{author|Origin}}}}}}|

revision.comment: add includeonly tags per protected edit request
Add line-height for quotes, replace some deprecated markup
less lineheight for quotes, other fixes.
not an actual semantic table, so mark with role=presentation (variants of <blockquote> templates are even better.)
code cleanup (see recent sandbox history for what each tweak is)
support parameter names of [[Template:Pull quote2]] for easier conversion; added title param. to cat. test
thin no-break space after em dash for readability

moving virtually dead code to ends of the #if tests (no one uses the numbered parameters any more since {{{3}}} was eliminated a long time ago); adding {{{quotetext}}} param. alias, from [[Template:Pull quote2]], for easier conversion.
installing RTL test so RTL variant of this template need not exist separately
throw an error if they forget to include the quote text
Use thinspace; nbsp is too wide (or use nbsp and en dash, but full-width spaces are not used with em dashes).
merging redundant code (and keeping it all inside "<!-- {{subst:FULLPAGENAME}} -->"); enabling citation of source w.o. author (e.g. scripture, law, etc.); sandboxed and testcased already.
per te request at [[Template talk:Pull quote#Pull quote templates edit request on 6 April 2016]]
adding parameter aliases to make pull quote templates more consistent
add optional rtl for right-to-left quotes in Arabic, will use in [[Ada Jafri]]
add optional rtl for right-to-left quotes in Arabic, will use in [[Ada Jafri]]
use hair space not thin space, like the rest of these templates
add explicit article-space example, per [[Template_talk:Rquote#Template-protected_edit_request_on_18_November_2020|this complaint]]
revision.text:
<noinclude>The template appears as follows in article space:
{{Quote|text={{lorem ipsum}}}}
and as follows in all other namespaces:
</noinclude>{{main other 
|demospace={{{demospace|}}} 
|1=<!-- result if in mainspace -->{{quote 
| text={{{text|{{{content|{{{quotetext|{{{quote|{{{1|<includeonly>{{error|Error: No text given for quotation (or equals sign used in the actual argument to an unnamed parameter)}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{lorem ipsum}}</noinclude>}}} }}} }}} }}} }}}
| author={{{author|{{{personquoted|}}} }}} 
| title ={{{title|{{{quotesource|{{{4|}}} }}} }}}
| source={{{source|{{{publication|{{{5|{{#if:{{{title}}}|{{{quotesource|}}}| }} }}} }}} }}}
}} 
|2=<!-- result if elsewhere --> 
{{(!}} class="cquote pullquote" role="presentation" {{#if:{{{rtl|}}}|dir="rtl"}} style="{{#switch:{{{float|}}}
  | left = float:left
  | right = float:right
  | #default = margin:auto
  }}; border-collapse: collapse; border: none; background-color: {{{bgcolor|transparent}}}; width: {{#if: {{{wide|}}} | 100% | {{{width|auto}}}}}; {{#if: {{{bgcolor|}}} | border: 1px solid #AAAAAA;}}"
{{!}} style="width: 20px; vertical-align: top; border: none; color: {{{qcolor|#B2B7F2}}}; font-size: {{#switch:{{{size|{{{quotewidth|{{{width|{{{2|20px}}}}}}}}}}}}
|10px=20px
|30px=60px
|40px=80px
|50px=100px
|60px=120px
|#default=40px}}; font-family: {{#if:{{{rtl|}}}|Roman|'Times New Roman', Times}}, serif; font-weight: bold; line-height: .6em; text-align: left; padding: {{#if:{{{small|}}}|10px 2px|10px 10px}};" {{!}} {{#if:{{{rtl|}}}|”|“}}
{{!}} style="vertical-align: top; border: none;{{#if:{{{rtl|}}}|direction:rtl;}} padding: {{#if:{{{small|}}}|4px 2px|4px 10px}}; {{#ifeq:{{{quotealign|}}}|center|text-align:center;}}" {{!}} {{trim quotes|{{{text|{{{content|{{{quotetext|{{{quote|{{{1|<includeonly>{{error|Error: No text given for quotation (or equals sign used in the actual argument to an unnamed parameter)}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{lorem ipsum}}</noinclude>}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}
{{!}} style="width: 20px; vertical-align: bottom; border: none; color: {{{qcolor|#B2B7F2}}}; font-size: {{#switch:{{{size|{{{quotewidth|{{{width|{{{2|20px}}}}}}}}}}}}

{{!-}}
{{#if:{{{author|{{{personquoted|{{{source|{{{publication|{{{title|{{{quotesource|{{{4|{{{5|}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}|{{#if:{{NAMESPACE}}||[[Category:Articles with attributed pull quotes]]}}
{{!}} colspan="3" class="cquotecite" style="border: none; padding-right: 4%; font-size: smaller; line-height:normal; text-align: right;" {{!}} <cite>— {{#if:{{{author|{{{personquoted|{{{4|}}}}}}}}}|{{{author|{{{personquoted|{{{4}}}}}}}}}{{#if:{{{source|{{{publication|{{{title|{{{quotesource|{{{5|}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}|, {{{source|{{{publication|{{{title|{{{quotesource|{{{5}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}|{{#if:{{{source|{{{publication|{{{title|{{{quotesource|{{{5|}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}|{{{source|{{{publication|{{{title|{{{quotesource|{{{5}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}</cite>
}}
{{!)}}
}}<!-- {{subst:FULLPAGENAME}} --><noinclude>

revision.comment: Skip {{lorem ipsum}} on transclusions to save resources per details on [[Wikipedia:Template limits]]. Don't let {{lorem ipsum}} show up in lists of transcluded templates on ordinary pages
Default font Times New Roman per talk page request
reduced " size as per request on talk page
Implement changes proposed on talk page
rm merge tag per talk page request
changed align to margin; made protection tag less obnoxious; standardized documentation
% instead of em, em gives problems in IE
rm line-height:100%;, gives problems with IE, not enough in the case of ref tags

{| class="cquote" style="display:block; margin:auto; border-collapse: collapse; border: none; background-color: {{{bgcolor|transparent}}}; width: {{#if: {{{wide|}}} | 100% | auto}}; {{#if: {{{bgcolor|}}} | border: 1px solid #AAAAAA;}}" | width="20" valign="top" style="border:none; color:#B2B7F2;font-size:{{#switch:{{{size|{{{2|{{{quotewidth|{{{width|20px}}}}}}}}}}}} |10px=20px |30px=60px |40px=80px |50px=100px |60px=120px |#default=35px}};font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif; font-weight: bold; text-align: left; padding: 10px 10px;" | “ | valign="top" style="border: none; padding: 4px 10px;" | {{{text|{{{1|Insert the text of the quote here, without quotation marks. {{lorem ipsum}}}}}}}} | width="20" valign="bottom" style="border: none; color: #B2B7F2; font-size: {{#switch:{{{size|{{{2|{{{quotewidth|{{{width|20px}}}}}}}}}}}} |10px=20px |30px=60px |40px=80px |50px=100px |60px=120px |#default=35px}}; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif; font-weight: bold; text-align: right; padding: 10px 10px;" | ” |- {{#if:{{{4|{{{author|}}}}}}{{{5|{{{source|{{{publication|}}}}}}}}}| {{!}} colspan="3" class="cquotecite" style="border: none; padding-right: 4%" {{!}} {{#if:{{{4|{{{author|Origin}}}}}}|

—{{{4|{{{author}}}}}}{{#if:{{{5|{{{source|{{{publication|Source}}}}}}}}}|, {{{5|{{{source|{{{publication}}}}}}}}}}}

}} }} |}{{#if:{{NAMESPACE}}||{{#if:{{{4|{{{author|}}}}}}{{{5|{{{source|{{{publication|}}}}}}}}}|[[Category:Articles with attributed pull quotes]]}}}}{{documentation}}

revision.comment: add includeonly tags per protected edit request

Changed protection level of Template:Centered pull quote: Dropping to template prot, per RFPP ([Edit=Allow only template editors and admins] (indefinite) [Move=Allow only template editors and admins] (indefinite))
Add line-height for quotes, replace some deprecated markup
less lineheight for quotes, other fixes.
not an actual semantic table, so mark with role=presentation (variants of <blockquote> templates are even better.)
code cleanup (see recent sandbox history for what each tweak is)
support parameter names of [[Template:Pull quote2]] for easier conversion; added title param. to cat. test
thin no-break space after em dash for readability

moving virtually dead code to ends of the #if tests (no one uses the numbered parameters any more since {{{3}}} was eliminated a long time ago); adding {{{quotetext}}} param. alias, from [[Template:Pull quote2]], for easier conversion.
installing RTL test so RTL variant of this template need not exist separately
throw an error if they forget to include the quote text
Use thinspace; nbsp is too wide (or use nbsp and en dash, but full-width spaces are not used with em dashes).
merging redundant code (and keeping it all inside "<!-- {{subst:FULLPAGENAME}} -->"); enabling citation of source w.o. author (e.g. scripture, law, etc.); sandboxed and testcased already.
per te request at [[Template talk:Pull quote#Pull quote templates edit request on 6 April 2016]]
adding parameter aliases to make pull quote templates more consistent
add optional rtl for right-to-left quotes in Arabic, will use in [[Ada Jafri]]
add optional rtl for right-to-left quotes in Arabic, will use in [[Ada Jafri]]
use hair space not thin space, like the rest of these templates
add explicit article-space example, per [[Template_talk:Rquote#Template-protected_edit_request_on_18_November_2020|this complaint]]

and as follows in all other namespaces:

  | left = float:left

  }}; border-collapse: collapse; border: none; background-color: {{{bgcolor|transparent}}}; width: {{#if: {{{wide|}}} | 100% | {{{width|auto}}}}}; {{#if: {{{bgcolor|}}} | border: 1px solid #AAAAAA;}}"

revision.comment: Skip {{lorem ipsum}} on transclusions to save resources per details on [[Wikipedia:Template limits]]. Don't let {{lorem ipsum}} show up in lists of transcluded templates on ordinary pages
Default font Times New Roman per talk page request
reduced " size as per request on talk page
Implement changes proposed on talk page
rm merge tag per talk page request
changed align to margin; made protection tag less obnoxious; standardized documentation
% instead of em, em gives problems in IE
rm line-height:100%;, gives problems with IE, not enough in the case of ref tags
Nominated for deletion; see [[Wikipedia:Templates for deletion#Template:Cquote]]. ([[WP:TW|TW]])

revision.comment: add includeonly tags per protected edit request
Add line-height for quotes, replace some deprecated markup
less lineheight for quotes, other fixes.
not an actual semantic table, so mark with role=presentation (variants of <blockquote> templates are even better.)
code cleanup (see recent sandbox history for what each tweak is)
support parameter names of [[Template:Pull quote2]] for easier conversion; added title param. to cat. test
thin no-break space after em dash for readability

moving virtually dead code to ends of the #if tests (no one uses the numbered parameters any more since {{{3}}} was eliminated a long time ago); adding {{{quotetext}}} param. alias, from [[Template:Pull quote2]], for easier conversion.
installing RTL test so RTL variant of this template need not exist separately
throw an error if they forget to include the quote text
Use thinspace; nbsp is too wide (or use nbsp and en dash, but full-width spaces are not used with em dashes).
merging redundant code (and keeping it all inside "<!-- {{subst:FULLPAGENAME}} -->"); enabling citation of source w.o. author (e.g. scripture, law, etc.); sandboxed and testcased already.
per te request at [[Template talk:Pull quote#Pull quote templates edit request on 6 April 2016]]
adding parameter aliases to make pull quote templates more consistent
add optional rtl for right-to-left quotes in Arabic, will use in [[Ada Jafri]]
add optional rtl for right-to-left quotes in Arabic, will use in [[Ada Jafri]]
use hair space not thin space, like the rest of these templates
add explicit article-space example, per [[Template_talk:Rquote#Template-protected_edit_request_on_18_November_2020|this complaint]]
revision.text:
<noinclude>The template appears as follows in article space:
{{Quote|text={{lorem ipsum}}}}
and as follows in all other namespaces:

|demospace={{{demospace|}}}

rm merge tag per talk page request
changed align to margin; made protection tag less obnoxious; standardized documentation

rm line-height:100%;, gives problems with IE, not enough in the case of ref tags

revision.comment: add includeonly tags per protected edit request
Add line-height for quotes, replace some deprecated markup
less lineheight for quotes, other fixes.
not an actual semantic table, so mark with role=presentation (variants of <blockquote> templates are even better.)
Plastikspork moved page [[Template:Centered pull quote]] to [[Template:Pull quote]]: [[Wikipedia:Templates_for_discussion/Log/2014_October_11#Template:Lquote]]
code cleanup (see recent sandbox history for what each tweak is)
support parameter names of [[Template:Pull quote2]] for easier conversion; added title param. to cat. test
thin no-break space after em dash for readability

moving virtually dead code to ends of the #if tests (no one uses the numbered parameters any more since {{{3}}} was eliminated a long time ago); adding {{{quotetext}}} param. alias, from [[Template:Pull quote2]], for easier conversion.
installing RTL test so RTL variant of this template need not exist separately

self-rv; this was being used in only one article and (predictably) it's not even a pull quote anyway, but someone abusing pull quote templates to decorate a block quotation (which also ignored [[WP:USEENGLISH]]).
throw an error if they forget to include the quote text
Use thinspace; nbsp is too wide (or use nbsp and en dash, but full-width spaces are not used with em dashes).
merging redundant code (and keeping it all inside "<!-- {{subst:FULLPAGENAME}} -->"); enabling citation of source w.o. author (e.g. scripture, law, etc.); sandboxed and testcased already.
per te request at [[Template talk:Pull quote#Pull quote templates edit request on 6 April 2016]]
adding parameter aliases to make pull quote templates more consistent
add optional rtl for right-to-left quotes in Arabic, will use in [[Ada Jafri]]
add optional rtl for right-to-left quotes in Arabic, will use in [[Ada Jafri]]
use hair space not thin space, like the rest of these templates
add explicit article-space example, per [[Template_talk:Rquote#Template-protected_edit_request_on_18_November_2020|this complaint]]
revision.text:
<noinclude>The template appears as follows in article space:
{{Quote|text={{lorem ipsum}}}}
and as follows in all other namespaces:
</noinclude>{{main other 
|demospace={{{demospace|}}} 
|1=<!-- result if in mainspace -->{{quote 
| text={{{text|{{{content|{{{quotetext|{{{quote|{{{1|<includeonly>{{error|Error: No text given for quotation (or equals sign used in the actual argument to an unnamed parameter)}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{lorem ipsum}}</noinclude>}}} }}} }}} }}} }}}
| author={{{author|{{{personquoted|}}} }}} 
| title ={{{title|{{{quotesource|{{{4|}}} }}} }}}
| source={{{source|{{{publication|{{{5|{{#if:{{{title}}}|{{{quotesource|}}}| }} }}} }}} }}}
}} 
|2=<!-- result if elsewhere --> 
{{(!}} class="cquote pullquote" role="presentation" {{#if:{{{rtl|}}}|dir="rtl"}} style="{{#switch:{{{float|}}}
  | left = float:left
  | right = float:right
  | #default = margin:auto
  }}; border-collapse: collapse; border: none; background-color: {{{bgcolor|transparent}}}; width: {{#if: {{{wide|}}} | 100% | {{{width|auto}}}}}; {{#if: {{{bgcolor|}}} | border: 1px solid #AAAAAA;}}"
{{!}} style="width: 20px; vertical-align: top; border: none; color: {{{qcolor|#B2B7F2}}}; font-size: {{#switch:{{{size|{{{quotewidth|{{{width|{{{2|20px}}}}}}}}}}}}
|10px=20px
|30px=60px
|40px=80px
|50px=100px
|60px=120px
|#default=40px}}; font-family: {{#if:{{{rtl|}}}|Roman|'Times New Roman', Times}}, serif; font-weight: bold; line-height: .6em; text-align: left; padding: {{#if:{{{small|}}}|10px 2px|10px 10px}};" {{!}} {{#if:{{{rtl|}}}|”|“}}
{{!}} style="vertical-align: top; border: none;{{#if:{{{rtl|}}}|direction:rtl;}} padding: {{#if:{{{small|}}}|4px 2px|4px 10px}}; {{#ifeq:{{{quotealign|}}}|center|text-align:center;}}" {{!}} {{trim quotes|{{{text|{{{content|{{{quotetext|{{{quote|{{{1|<includeonly>{{error|Error: No text given for quotation (or equals sign used in the actual argument to an unnamed parameter)}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{lorem ipsum}}</noinclude>}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}
{{!}} style="width: 20px; vertical-align: bottom; border: none; color: {{{qcolor|#B2B7F2}}}; font-size: {{#switch:{{{size|{{{quotewidth|{{{width|{{{2|20px}}}}}}}}}}}}
|10px=20px
|30px=60px
|40px=80px
|50px=100px
|60px=120px
|#default=40px}}; font-family: {{#if:{{{rtl|}}}|Roman|'Times New Roman', Times}}, serif; font-weight: bold; line-height: .6em; text-align: right; padding: {{#if:{{{small|}}}|10px 2px|10px 10px}};" {{!}} {{#if:{{{rtl|}}}|“|”}}
{{!-}}
{{#if:{{{author|{{{personquoted|{{{source|{{{publication|{{{title|{{{quotesource|{{{4|{{{5|}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}|{{#if:{{NAMESPACE}}||[[Category:Articles with attributed pull quotes]]}}

revision.comment: add includeonly tags per protected edit request
Add line-height for quotes, replace some deprecated markup
less lineheight for quotes, other fixes.
not an actual semantic table, so mark with role=presentation (variants of <blockquote> templates are even better.)
Reverted edits by [[Special:Contribs/Pigsonthewing|Pigsonthewing]] ([[User talk:Pigsonthewing|talk]]) to last version by Plastikspork
code cleanup (see recent sandbox history for what each tweak is)
support parameter names of [[Template:Pull quote2]] for easier conversion; added title param. to cat. test
thin no-break space after em dash for readability

moving virtually dead code to ends of the #if tests (no one uses the numbered parameters any more since {{{3}}} was eliminated a long time ago); adding {{{quotetext}}} param. alias, from [[Template:Pull quote2]], for easier conversion.
installing RTL test so RTL variant of this template need not exist separately
throw an error if they forget to include the quote text
Use thinspace; nbsp is too wide (or use nbsp and en dash, but full-width spaces are not used with em dashes).
merging redundant code (and keeping it all inside "<!-- {{subst:FULLPAGENAME}} -->"); enabling citation of source w.o. author (e.g. scripture, law, etc.); sandboxed and testcased already.
per te request at [[Template talk:Pull quote#Pull quote templates edit request on 6 April 2016]]
adding parameter aliases to make pull quote templates more consistent
add optional rtl for right-to-left quotes in Arabic, will use in [[Ada Jafri]]
add optional rtl for right-to-left quotes in Arabic, will use in [[Ada Jafri]]
use hair space not thin space, like the rest of these templates
add explicit article-space example, per [[Template_talk:Rquote#Template-protected_edit_request_on_18_November_2020|this complaint]]
revision.text:
<noinclude>The template appears as follows in article space:
{{Quote|text={{lorem ipsum}}}}
and as follows in all other namespaces:
</noinclude>{{main other 
|demospace={{{demospace|}}} 
|1=<!-- result if in mainspace -->{{quote 
| text={{{text|{{{content|{{{quotetext|{{{quote|{{{1|<includeonly>{{error|Error: No text given for quotation (or equals sign used in the actual argument to an unnamed parameter)}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{lorem ipsum}}</noinclude>}}} }}} }}} }}} }}}
| author={{{author|{{{personquoted|}}} }}} 
| title ={{{title|{{{quotesource|{{{4|}}} }}} }}}
| source={{{source|{{{publication|{{{5|{{#if:{{{title}}}|{{{quotesource|}}}| }} }}} }}} }}}
}} 
|2=<!-- result if elsewhere --> 
{{(!}} class="cquote pullquote" role="presentation" {{#if:{{{rtl|}}}|dir="rtl"}} style="{{#switch:{{{float|}}}
  | left = float:left
  | right = float:right
  | #default = margin:auto
  }}; border-collapse: collapse; border: none; background-color: {{{bgcolor|transparent}}}; width: {{#if: {{{wide|}}} | 100% | {{{width|auto}}}}}; {{#if: {{{bgcolor|}}} | border: 1px solid #AAAAAA;}}"
{{!}} style="width: 20px; vertical-align: top; border: none; color: {{{qcolor|#B2B7F2}}}; font-size: {{#switch:{{{size|{{{quotewidth|{{{width|{{{2|20px}}}}}}}}}}}}
|10px=20px
|30px=60px

|50px=100px
|60px=120px
|#default=40px}}; font-family: {{#if:{{{rtl|}}}|Roman|'Times New Roman', Times}}, serif; font-weight: bold; line-height: .6em; text-align: left; padding: {{#if:{{{small|}}}|10px 2px|10px 10px}};" {{!}} {{#if:{{{rtl|}}}|”|“}}
{{!}} style="vertical-align: top; border: none;{{#if:{{{rtl|}}}|direction:rtl;}} padding: {{#if:{{{small|}}}|4px 2px|4px 10px}}; {{#ifeq:{{{quotealign|}}}|center|text-align:center;}}" {{!}} {{trim quotes|{{{text|{{{content|{{{quotetext|{{{quote|{{{1|<includeonly>{{error|Error: No text given for quotation (or equals sign used in the actual argument to an unnamed parameter)}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{lorem ipsum}}</noinclude>}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}
{{!}} style="width: 20px; vertical-align: bottom; border: none; color: {{{qcolor|#B2B7F2}}}; font-size: {{#switch:{{{size|{{{quotewidth|{{{width|{{{2|20px}}}}}}}}}}}}
|10px=20px

|60px=120px

<noinclude>The template appears as follows in article space:

| author={{{author|{{{personquoted|}}} }}} 
| title ={{{title|{{{quotesource|{{{4|}}} }}} }}}
| source={{{source|{{{publication|{{{5|{{#if:{{{title}}}|{{{quotesource|}}}| }} }}} }}} }}}
}} 
|2=<!-- result if elsewhere --> 
{{(!}} class="cquote pullquote" role="presentation" {{#if:{{{rtl|}}}|dir="rtl"}} style="{{#switch:{{{float|}}}
  | left = float:left
  | right = float:right
  | #default = margin:auto
  }}; border-collapse: collapse; border: none; {{#if:{{{bgcolor|}}}|background-color: {{{bgcolor}}}; border: 1px solid #aaa;}} width: {{#if: {{{wide|}}} | 100% | {{{width|auto}}}}};"
{{!}} style="width: 20px; vertical-align: top; border: none; color: {{{qcolor|#B2B7F2}}}; font-size: {{#switch:{{{size|{{{quotewidth|{{{width|{{{2|20px}}}}}}}}}}}}
|10px=20px
|30px=60px
|40px=80px
|50px=100px
|60px=120px

{{!}} style="width: 20px; vertical-align: bottom; border: none; color: {{{qcolor|#B2B7F2}}}; font-size: {{#switch:{{{size|{{{quotewidth|{{{width|{{{2|20px}}}}}}}}}}}}
